'''[[Tsukkia]]n water freighters''' were large [[Starship/Legends|starships]] produced on [[Tsukkia]], capable of carrying huge cargoes of [[Water/Legends|water]] to planets with little to no water.

The ''[[Home]]'' was such a ship converted into a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] space station.

{{Ship-stub}}
